# GEO AI

> Your business, recommended by AI.

GEO AI deploys 8 specialized agents that work 24/7 to make your business the answer on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google.

## Agents
- Cortex: Business Intelligence Agent
- Scout: Demand Intelligence Agent
- Blueprint: Content Strategy Agent
- Forge: Content and Design Agent
- Rival: Competitive Intelligence Agent
- Signal: Publishing and Indexing Agent
- Anchor: Authority and Citation Agent
- Pulse: Performance Agent

## Pricing
- Starter: $499/mo
- Growth: $999/mo
- Scale: $2,499/mo

## Links
- Homepage: https://geoai.com
- Signup: https://geoai.com/signup
